meaning: n.杀害,猎护品,赚得的一笔大钱adj.致死的,使人疲乏的v.杀害
examples: The motive for the killing is unknown.
The killing caused an international outcry.
Like everyone else, I deplore and condemn this killing.
Raising taxes is about killing jobs and hurting small businesses and making things worse.
It protected us from thalidomide, but its slow and careful ways may be killing cancer patients.
